error.signature: RuntimeError: Could not load storage plugin: sqlite3

verdict.summary: rosbag2 cannot find the storage backend plugin. Usually the rosbag2 storage packages are not installed.

dead_ends.action: Install sqlite3 system library and expect rosbag2 to find it
dead_ends.why_fails: rosbag2 needs its own ROS wrapper plugin, not just the system sqlite3 library

dead_ends.action: Build rosbag2 from source in your workspace
dead_ends.why_fails: rosbag2 has many interdependent packages; partial source builds create version conflicts

workarounds.action: Install the rosbag2 storage plugin packages
Verify plugin is found with ros2 bag info on an existing bag
Use MCAP storage format as alternative (better performance)
